prompts.label: Parquet versus CSV for analytics
prompts.text:
Explain Parquet columnar storage benefits for repeated analytics reads.
Compare to CSV simplicity for tiny human-edited files.
Mention schema embedded in files lightly.
Advise pandas read_parquet basics.
Point to Arrow ecosystem as optional reading.

prompts.label: Rolling windows in pandas
prompts.text:
Demonstrate rolling means with min_periods handling initial NaNs.
Explain differencing resample versus rolling mentally.
Mention timezone-aware indexes caution.
Advise plotting sanity checks.
Avoid diving into heavy statistics theory.

prompts.label: Train-test leakage checklist
prompts.text:
List leakage examples: fit preprocessing on full dataset, shuffle time series wrongly, duplicate rows across splits.
Encourage sklearn Pipeline-like encapsulation conceptually.
Advise temporal splits when time matters.
Warn about metric optimism.
Keep tone encouraging for beginners.

prompts.label: SMOTE class imbalance caution
prompts.text:
Explain SMOTE conceptually as synthetic oversampling.
Warn about pipeline ordering mistakes causing leakage.
Suggest class_weight style baselines first.
Mention metrics beyond accuracy truthfully.
Avoid promising silver bullets.

prompts.label: dbt incremental models overview
prompts.text:
Describe incremental models updating only new rows in warehouses conceptually.
Explain full refresh escape hatches when stuck.
Mention uniqueness tests guarding keys lightly.
Differentiate from notebook exploration workflows.
Encourage clear documentation of assumptions.

prompts.label: Great Expectations style checks
prompts.text:
Outline expectation suites validating batches before publishing datasets conceptually.
Discuss scheduling checks in CI lightly.
Start with simple not-null and range checks.
Relate to upstream validation in apps.
Warn about heavyweight adoption too early.

prompts.label: Feature store concepts lite
prompts.text:
Differentiate offline training feature tables versus online low-latency serving needs.
Mention consistency challenges honestly without vendor pitch.
Advise beginners to solidify batch pipelines first realistically.
Encourage cross-team contracts on definitions.
Name-drop tools only as optional exploration.

prompts.label: Airflow catchup and start_date traps
prompts.text:
Explain how start_date and catchup can accidentally enqueue huge backfills.
Advise reading scheduler timezone settings carefully.
Encourage idempotent tasks.
Mention secrets backends lightly.
Keep example conceptual not a full DAG dump.

prompts.label: Survivorship bias in metrics
prompts.text:
Tell a simple story where filtering survivors distorts conversion rates.
Encourage documenting cohort definitions transparently.
Mention Simpson's paradox as optional vocabulary.
Advise plotting before modeling routinely.
Promote curious friendly tone.

prompts.label: Data contracts between teams
prompts.text:
Describe producers publishing schemas with compatibility expectations.
Suggest automated checks on publish conceptually.
Mention Avro/Protobuf lightly without mandating.
Warn about committees blocking progress if overdone.
Emphasize empathy between teams.
